items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Mail tracking and delivery confirmation', which is mentioned in the linked use case but lacks concrete evidence in the prior steps. There are no API reads or persisted state checks provided that confirm the implementation or functionality of this requirement. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to inconclusive evidence regarding the specific requirement.
